log: === INITIATIVE ===

Sea Elf — Bardic Musician casts Polymorph (4th level)
→ Sea Elf — Bardic Musician polymorphs into a Giant Ape! (157 HP, AC 12, multiattack: 2)
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 12] HIT! 17 damage. Sea Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 140/157
→ Concentration save: [13 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 12] HIT! 19 damage. Sea Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 121/157
→ Sea Elf — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Polymorph
→ Sea Elf — Bardic Musician reverts from Polymorph to original form (HP: 67/67)
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Sea Elf — Bardic Musician HP: 47/67
⚡ Sea Elf — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:2 total 12 vs AC 12 — still hits.
